caption:
Fix your mind on me, be devoted to me, worship me, bow to me. I truly promise — you will come to me, for you are very dear to me.

— Bhagavad Gita 18.65

#bhagavadgita #sanskrit #vedanta #hinduism #spirituality #sanatandharma #yoga #bhakti #upanishads #vedas #ashtavakra #shiva #krishna #wisdom #dailyverse
